mapper.sql: select s.share_id, s.dept_id, s.period_id, s.share_no, s.net_profit, s.manager_profit_rate, s.manager_profit_amount, s.investor_profit_amount, s.status, s.share_time, s.del_flag, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from fin_profit_share_record s
mapper.select: where period_id=#{periodId} and status != '2' and del_flag='0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into fin_profit_share_record(dept_id, period_id, share_no, net_profit, manager_profit_rate, manager_profit_amount, investor_profit_amount, status, share_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{deptId}, #{periodId}, #{shareNo}, #{netProfit}, #{managerProfitRate}, #{managerProfitAmount}, #{investorProfitAmount}, #{status}, #{shareTime}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: update fin_profit_share_record set del_flag='2' where share_id=#{shareId}
update fin_profit_share_record set del_flag='2' where share_id in #{shareId}
